feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Can We Build Live Insights Using CDS Views and SAP Analytics Cloud Within 15 Days?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

My name is E Pranith Kumar, and I am a fresher. My team and I are eager to take up a meaningful challenge and deliver a strong outcome within a short timeline.

We are exploring the possibility of building live insights using CDS Views and SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). I would like to understand:

  • Is it feasible to build live analytical insights using CDS Views and SAC within 15 days?
  • If yes, what are the key prerequisites (system setup, authorizations, versions, and connectivity)?
  • Which T-codes/tools are typically used for:
    • Creating and exposing CDS Views
    • Enabling live connectivity to SAC
    • Authorization and data access

We have been provided with a few use cases (attached below). Since we are new to this domain, your guidance would be extremely helpful:

  • Which use case would be best suited for a short timeline?
  • Which one offers the best feature scope and business impact?
  • What SAP modules are typically involved for the recommended use case?
  • What type of system access or roles would be required to implement it?

Additionally, if possible, could you please recommend any learning resources or documentation that would help us research, learn, and implement this effectively?

Although we are new to CDS Views and SAC, we are highly motivated and ready to put in the effort. With your guidance, we are confident we can deliver meaningful insights.

Thank you very much for your time and support. I truly appreciate any direction you can provide.

Best regards,
E Pranith Kumar

entry.title: Effectivecontext not capturing all updated lines in single entry/fluid entry mode
entry.content:
Hi,

We have used onafterdataentryprocess event and capturing only changed cost object-cost element combination in effectiveContext.These are getting passed in multi action as parameters.

Issue is when we are making changes in multiple lines in the table in single entry mode/fluid entry mode, it is taking only last updated line. This effectiveContext is only working when we are using Mass entry mode.

Is this a known limitation with single entry/fluid entry mode.

Thanks.

entry.title: Calculate Average Salary per Job level using data action
entry.content:
Dear SAC Experts,

I am trying to calculate Average Salary per Job level using Advanced Formulas in Data action. Below is the sample data and I need to calculate Average Salary at Job level. I am not able to get the count value populated. 

Below is the code:

In the next step while writing data, I am calculating Average by using (@totalsalary/@count).

Could anyone of you please help with the code.

entry.title: Dimension Hierarchy Text gets truncated in SAC stories
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a SAC story that uses dimension hierarchies in widgets. The text of the hierarchy node in those widgets is getting truncated. In the SAP BW, the hierarchy is maintained correctly. But when used in SAC stories, it gets truncated.  The size of the widget does not impact; even with larger widgets, the text does not display correctly. 

Please let me know how we can resolve this.

Regards,

Pratik Shah

entry.title: How Actual and planning data cab be reported combinedly in SAC?
entry.content:
HI Team,

Could you please check and share how we can achieve below scenario in SAP Data Sphere and SAC?

Lets say, I have Sales data in data sphere tables which is actuals and wanted to load this data to SAC for planning. After planning, I want to report actuals and plan in same report in SAC. 

1. Can we store actuals also in SAC along with planning? Is it a good approach?

2. Should I access actual data from data sphere to SAC using live connection and prepare the plan data in SAC. In this case, is plan data stores in SAC or shall I push the plan data also to Data sphere to do the combine reporting from Data sphere to SAC using live connection.

3. Or do we need to maintain the actuals in Data sphere and plan data in SAC, and do the reporting using some views or models in SAC.

Which is the best approach to do the actuals and planning data in same report in SAC. Kindly share your feedback.

entry.title: Mac user is unable to use the SAC Excel Add-in on the desktop or web
entry.content: Mac user is unable to use the SAC Excel Add-in on the desktop or web. He is not able to access the Admin Managed section in the Add-in icon

entry.title: SAC: Data not refreshed by refresh button/auto refresh - No "Live Data" possible?
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

We are facing the following problem:
Data in SAC dashboard are not refreshed when using the standard refresh button or scripts like Application.refreshData().
We need to reopen the browser page in order to get the latest set of data. 

Setup: 
Dashboard -> CDS VM -> S/4HANA Tables

Caching is already disabled in RSRT: 3384063 - Refresh button from SAP Analytics Cloud Story does not update the data for BW live data connection - SAP for Me

May I ask you for any ideas how real "Live Data" could be achieved? 
In the final solution we would like to use the auto refresh function in SAC with an interval of a few minutes.

Thank you

entry.title: SAC Story - Tab Strip Builder not working
entry.content:
Dear SAC Experts,

When I started building my SAC Story, I inserted a Tab Strip on 2 of the pages. The project was put on hold for a couple of months, but today I revisited it to continue building on it, only to find that the builder tab for only one of the tab strips was working. The other on was simply just returning a blank page.

Have any of you ever run into that problem as well? And if yes, do you have a solution?

Thanks in Advance!

entry.title: YTD Function in Calculated Measure of Model Doesn't Work
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a calculated measure in my model using the YTD function.  (The measure is at the model level, not the story level.)  The formula I'm using is this:  YTD([MTD], [d/Date]).

When I test the measure in a story, no results display.  I am simply pulling GL Account in the rows and Date in the columns.  YTD is the measure.  Why are no results displaying?

entry.title: How can I get Account dimension hierarchy in Datasphere Live model?
entry.content:
Hi experts, I would like to know when using the Datasphere live model in SAC, how can I achieve the SAC native Account dimension reporting capabilities, like aggregations and calculations on the hierarchy nodes? If my requirement is to develop a financial KPI based report on Datasphere Live model with calculated nodes in the account hierarchy structure how to do that?

Example:  Calculating the operating income KPI on a calculation from Revenue - Operating expenses, keep the operating income in the GL account hierarchy structure. If I create a measure based calculation, there will be more measures, but Finance team would like to see that in a account hierarchy.

entry.title: Data analyzer dimension/measure show/hide
entry.content: Hello Team, We want to hide some of the columns from data analyzer for any table. These columns should be hidden from the Navigation panel from right menu only. The columns should be present in the story but not in the data analyzer backed by same analytical model from Datasphere. Please help

entry.title: SAC-Datasphere Location Dimension Issue at Choroplet map
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I faced issue in our TDD system with Location Dimension. I created Dimension view and created calculated column as Geo-Dimension with latitude and longitude in Datasphere. I did all process to use this dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud. Location dimension is working fine for Bubble and Heat Map but when i tried to see at Choroplet map feauture i get error message as below: 

i worked with same dataset in other system with same process and it works fine for all map features but in our SAC system it's not working. What can be the issue?

entry.title: SAC System Checklist for MySQL5 Password Change
entry.content: Please provide a guide on the tasks that need to be checked and configured in SAC when the DBMS (MySQL5) has been changed. Since only the production database has been modified, it is not sufficient for us to test on our side, so we are requesting your support.

entry.title: Native way to list "In-Use" Dimensions/Measures for Dashboard Documentation?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am working on a project to centralize the documentation of our analytics assets. I need to list the technical components (Dimensions, Measures, and Filters) that are actually used within each of our SAC Stories.

The goal is to provide users with a clear view of what data is represented in each dashboard without them having to open the Story and investigate the widgets.

The Issue: Currently, I find it very difficult to get this information automatically. A Data Model or the Queries might contain 50 dimensions, but a specific Story might only use 5 of them. I need to identify those 5 "active" dimensions. Same for Measures or Filters.

Manually opening every Story and clicking on every Chart/Table to check the "Builder" panel is not a viable option for us due to the number of dashboards we manage.

My Questions:

  1. Is there a native feature or a standard report in SAC that provides a summary of the objects (Dimensions/Measures) actually placed in a Story’s widgets?
  2. Does the SAC Catalog offer a way to display these specific "In-Use" technical metadata in the overview or discovery tabs?
  3. Is there any "Usage" or "Impact Analysis" view that works from the Story level down to the Dimension level, rather than just from the Model level?

I am looking for a standard method within the interface to avoid manual auditing.

Thank you for your insights!

entry.title: Can I export javascript code from SAC story
entry.content:
Hi

We would like to export SAC story javascript code to separate file.

Is this possible?

entry.title: Deprecated Classic History
entry.content: The problem is that classic stories need functionality that optimized stories don't have.

entry.title: Default SAP Identity Provider (IdP) Behavior for SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like to get a better understanding on how the default SAP Identity Provider (IdP) works for SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC).

We are currently facing an issue with SSO for SAP Analytics Cloud, and we have reverted to the default IdP from a custom IdP. Since then I am not able to log in to SAP Analytics Cloud (with my SAP credentials) and I get the 'It seems that you don't have an active account' page. 

I have verified my account with https://hanacloudservices-eu.accounts.ondemand.com/ and have also reset my password. The credentials I set during the authentication are aligned with the details displayed in Profile Management (https://hanacloudservices-eu.accounts.ondemand.com/).

It also seems that some users are able to log in without any issues using their SAP credentials.

Any insights into how the default SAP IdP for SAP Analytics Cloud functions and what might be causing this issue would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks, and best regards,

CS

entry.title: Issue while creating the measure input control
entry.content:
While creating the measure input control. The error is coming stating "The query was stopped before it finished because the server was unable to complete the request. Please try filtering your data, or contacting your administrator."

Due to this error I am unable to apply measure based filter into the chart.

entry.title: Failed to create Live Connection at SAP SAC to SAP HANA Cloud for FinOps
entry.content:
Fehler bei der Verifizierung einer Live Connection in SAC (eu20) auf eine SAP HANA Cloud (eu30).

Allow all IP addresses ist in der HANA Instanz gesetzt. Trotzdem scheitert das anlegen der Connection

Anleitung ist von SAP https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q0X_XF1QuAg

https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-resource-consumption-monitor

Die Fehler-Meldung ist sehr unspezifisch.  

We couldn't connect to your HANA system. For more information, see our troubleshooting page.
Correlation ID: 8502223582444492b974251792547832

entry.title: Errors when trying to import a csv file into a model
entry.content:
The aim is to import 2 csv files into a model (one with prod and the other one with test data), with same columns, and compare the values for one column, against the other columns.

First I want to import one the 2 files, and right after the import step I can see 2 errors, maybe linked :

1) for some lines imported, the date value of the column "Date de début" (= begin date) is highlighted in red by SAC. However, the date format for the file and the one for the imported data are always OK

- file date format = dd.mm.yyyy, and imported data format = mm/dd/yyyy
- for the highlighted cells, the error message returned is "Invalid Date Format"

2) the same column "Date de début" has been generated by default as a Date dimension with hierarchical levels (Year, Quarter, month, Day) and it seems to be impossible to turn this column into a standard Generic dimension, 
as all other columns has been generated into. For the comparison step (with the 2nd file imported), I need to have all the columns as Generic dimensions, with the amount column as the only measure.

I send you some printscreens for help (attached file)

Could you please explain to me how to resolve these 2 errors ?

Thanks in advance
